overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a residential Los Santos neighborhood during a vibrant purple-pink sunset. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses two intersections with traffic lights, and transitions from apartment blocks to residential houses with hedgerows.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to apartment buildings, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: multi-story beige apartment complex with balconies and awnings
wooden telephone pole with multiple crossbars and wires
tall street lamp with glowing yellow light
tall palm tree silhouetted against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beside a beige apartment building during a vibrant sunset. Utility poles and street lights line the path while parked cars sit along the curb. The street is empty of pedestrians as the character approaches a distant intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: steps off sidewalk and enters the open intersection crosswalk
traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while observing traffic lights and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection on the cross street

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
overhead traffic signal showing red then changing to green
two-story house with dark roof and front hedge

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide intersection crosswalk as the sun sets behind distant buildings. Traffic lights hang overhead, changing from red to green while a white sedan passes through. The apartment building recedes behind as the character moves toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with hedgerows and parked cars

events.description: turns right at the corner onto a new sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and turning right at the corner to follow the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing on the corner near the hedge

entered.detail: tall green hedge running along the property line
low stone retaining wall with rounded top

segments.scene_description: After crossing, the character walks past a residential house with a tall hedge and turns right at the corner. The sidewalk runs alongside a stone wall on the left and parked cars on the right. A pedestrian stands near the corner hedge as the character passes.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined sidewalk with high hedges approaching church

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk with a stone wall on the left and street on the right, approaching another intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: gothic-style church with pointed steeple silhouetted against the sunset

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a sidewalk bordered by a high stone wall and trimmed hedges. A distinctive church with a pointed steeple becomes visible in the distance against the purple sunset. Another pedestrian walks toward the camera as the character approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk with church on corner

events.description: breaks into a run while crossing the intersection
crossing the street while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: running across the intersection toward the church as the sun sets directly ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian running ahead of the character across the crosswalk

entered.detail: white striped crosswalk lines leading toward the church

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run to cross the final intersection as the sun sits low on the horizon behind the church. Another pedestrian runs ahead across the crosswalk. Vehicles are visible on the cross street as the character moves toward the church corner, with the stone wall and utility poles now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a residential neighborhood that transitions from urban apartment blocks to a suburban streetscape under a vibrant purple-pink sunset. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beside a beige apartment building and parked cars, moving steadily toward a distant intersection. As the character enters the wide crosswalk, the apartment building recedes and the lighting shifts as the sun dips behind distant buildings while a white sedan passes through the green light. The scene then shifts toward a more residential atmosphere, passing a tall hedge and a stone wall before turning a corner where a pointed church steeple emerges against the deepening purple sky. Finally, the character breaks into a run to cross a second intersection, leaving the stone walls behind to move toward the church as the sun sits low on the horizon.
